en.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, MultiCam)
en.description: A specialized body armor developed for the FSB’s Special Purpose Center, featuring high functionality and modularity. MultiCam version.

en.name: Haley Strategic D3CRX Chest Harness (Black)
en.description: The Haley Strategic D3CRX Combat chest rig is one of the most respected PMC rig systems. Ease and comfort of use are supported by the presence of the optimal number of pouches.

en.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Death is Inevitable)
en.description: The Gladiator-S body armor by FORT, customized by the Arena Champion nicknamed JP. Since his very first appearance in the Arena as a gladiator, he never even thought of washing the blood off it. Why would he? It’s a symbol of strength.

en.name: LBT-1961A Load Bearing Chest Rig (MultiCam)
en.description: A tactical load-bearing system designed to carry magazines, grenades, and special equipment, while using low-profile body armor. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading. MultiCam version.

en.name: LBT-1961A Load Bearing Chest Rig (DNC)
en.description: A tactical load-bearing system designed to carry magazines, grenades, and special equipment, while using low-profile body armor. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading. Desert Night Camouflage version.

en.name: Stich Profi Chest Rig MK2 (Recon, EMR)
en.description: The "Chest-Rig" tactical system can be used as an independent piece of equipment or as an addition to body armor without the MOLLE system. Suitable for combat training instructors, special forces units. Recon preset in EMR camouflage. Manufactured by Stich Profi.

en.name: First Spear Strandhogg plate carrier (MultiCam Black)
en.description: Taking its name from an Old Norse Viking term for a lightning raid, Strandhögg was one of the first formalized battle tactics to use covert infiltrators in advance of an actual raiding operation. Strandhögg was a tactical game-changer in its time, just like the technological advances First Spear is bringing forward in this line of plate carriers.

weaponPresets._name: Vest FirstSpear Strandhogg Multicam Black Standard

en.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, MultiCam)
en.description: A specialized body armor developed for the FSB’s Special Purpose Center, featuring high functionality and modularity. The lightweight version is designed to provide maximum mobility while protecting vital organs. MultiCam version.

en.name: Stich Profi Plate Carrier V2 (A-TACS FG)
en.description: An improved lightweight version of the standard plate carrier manufactured by Stich Profi. A-TACS FG version.

weaponPresets._name: Vest Stich Profi Plate Carrier Ver 2 A-TACS FG Standart

en.name: WARTECH TV-115 plate carrier (Black)
en.description: The TV-115 Operational armor system in a minimalist setup. Manufactured by WARTECH. Black version.

en.name: Direct Action Thunderbolt compact chest rig (Ranger Green)
en.description: The Thunderbolt fixed chest rig, containing all the basic utility pouches you'd need. Manufactured by Direct Action. Ranger Green version.

en.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, Viking)
en.description: A specialized body armor developed for the FSB’s Special Purpose Center, featuring high functionality and modularity. The lightweight version is designed to provide maximum mobility while protecting vital organs. This black version has been customized by one of the Arena fighters.

en.name: Stich Profi Plate Carrier V2 (Coyote)
en.description: An improved lightweight version of the standard plate carrier manufactured by Stich Profi. Coyote color version.

weaponPresets._name: Vest Stich Profi Plate Carrier Ver 2 Coyote Standart
